creator: nikola.lecic@anthesphoria.net
text:
Take maintainership; already maintaining other m17n-project ports.
The current maintainer is not willing to maintain this port anymore.

References:

  http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2010-February/059686.html
  http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2010-February/059690.html
